engine_note: No OPENAI_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / SERPAPI_API_KEY / PERPLEXITY_API_KEY present in scheduled-task environment. WebSearch used as a directional proxy for organic/citation presence only — engine-specific (ChatGPT / Claude / Google AIO / Perplexity) columns cannot be filled accurately. Day 21 of this limitation.
sampling: Focused sample of 4 = 1 apply target (retail, next canonical-sweep vertical) + 3 alert-bucket trackers (compliance, assessment, partner_channel) per v2 bucket-failure monitoring.

results.notes: Top results are e-commerce-platform and agency guides leading with product descriptions at scale (~10x productivity), customer service automation, and personalized recommendations. sayfeai.com not present. This is the apply target for today's canonical sweep (12/16).

PILLAR HANDOFF — /compliance-assessment still 404. Competitors own the '60-second / 5-minute / instant-result / free' promise (IS Partners 60-sec, PeachByte/BridgeView 5-min). Engine 1 core conversion page. ~11 site-wide CTAs now point to a 404.

BigLaw alerts (Epstein Becker, Finnegan, Crowell, Reed Smith, Fisher Phillips, Buchalter, Lathrop GPM) fully own the SB 26-189 / ADMT query. Our blog is accurate and current (SB 26-189, ADMT, Jan 1 2027, no <50-FTE carve-out) but not cited — the durable win requires the /compliance/colorado-ai-act pillar (P0).

Engine 2 (MSP channel). 'Compliance as a recurring MSP retainer' theme (meetgradient, managedservicesjournal 'high-margin frontier', ConnectWise+Microsoft SMB playbook) continues to dominate. Zero MSP-channel content on sayfeai.com — needs the /partners/msp pillar (P2). No new competitor crossed the 3+ auto-detect threshold this run.
